packageRules.description: tsgo / TypeScript 7 native preview. Currently in active prerelease (versions are all 7.0.0-dev.<date>); the latest dist-tag is the only one with up-to-date Go-stdlib CVE fixes, so we follow it and suppress per-bump Docker rebuilds via the [skip-build] suffix. CLEANUP WHEN TS 7 IS STABLE: drop followTag, drop commitMessageSuffix, restore default release cadence; @typescript/native-preview is expected to ship a stable major eventually (track https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/milestones). Also remove the matching if-guard in .github/workflows/build.yaml.
